lines.speaker: Gwindor
lines.text: Isn't it wonderful? So many books, so much knowledge to be absorbed!

lines.speaker: Gwindor
lines.text: Where did I see that book? It can't be far...

lines.speaker: Gwindor
lines.text: I'm sure it was around here somewhere...

lines.speaker: Gwindor
lines.text: What can I do for ya?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any good books to recommend?

lines.speaker: Gwindor
lines.text: I've always found Prifddinas' History to be fascinating!

lines.speaker: Gwindor
lines.text: I've always found The Journal of Randas to be fascinating!

lines.speaker: Gwindor
lines.text: I've always found Big Book of Bangs to be fascinating!

lines.speaker: Gwindor
lines.text: I've always found The Great Divide to be fascinating!

lines.speaker: Gwindor
lines.text: I've always found Ode to Eternity to be fascinating!
